requirement_topic.en: Plugs and Sockets — BS 1363 Plug Requirement for UK Domestic Appliances
requirement_topic.zh: 插头和插座——英国家用电器 BS 1363 插头要求
requirement_topic.zht: 插頭和插座——英國家用電器 BS 1363 插頭要求

summary.en: The Plugs and Sockets, etc. (Safety) Regulations 1994 require plugs, sockets, adaptors and certain appliances supplied in the UK to meet UK plug-and-socket safety requirements. For a mains-powered GaN charger intended to plug directly into a UK domestic socket, the UK plug interface normally needs a compliant BS 1363 plug construction with appropriate fuse arrangements where applicable. This plug-safety duty is separate from UKCA/CE electrical-safety and EMC conformity.
summary.zh: 《1994年插头和插座等（安全）法规》要求在英国供应的插头、插座、转换器和特定电器符合英国插头插座安全要求。对于拟直接插入英国家用插座的市电供电氮化镓充电器，英国插头接口通常需要符合 BS 1363 插头结构，并在适用时配置合适熔断器。该插头安全义务独立于 UKCA/CE 电气安全和 EMC 合规。
summary.zht: 《1994年插頭和插座等（安全）法規》要求在英國供應的插頭、插座、轉換器和特定電器符合英國插頭插座安全要求。對於擬直接插入英國家用插座的市電供電氮化鎵充電器，英國插頭接口通常需要符合 BS 1363 插頭結構，並在適用時配置合適熔斷器。該插頭安全義務獨立於 UKCA/CE 電氣安全和 EMC 合規。

standards_or_laws: The Plugs and Sockets, etc. (Safety) Regulations 1994 (SI 1994/1768)
BS 1363 plug system requirements referenced by the UK plug-safety regime

summary.en: China-market chargers commonly use Chinese plug forms and China plug/socket standards. A CN plug configuration or travel adaptor approach is not equivalent to a UK BS 1363 plug for domestic supply in the UK.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电器通常使用中国插头形式及中国插头插座标准。中国插头配置或旅行转换器方案不等同于英国国内供应所需的 BS 1363 插头。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電器通常使用中國插頭形式及中國插頭插座標準。中國插頭配置或旅行轉換器方案不等同於英國國內供應所需的 BS 1363 插頭。

gap.en: A charger body designed around CN, EU or US pins normally needs a UK-specific plug design, compliant conversion plug arrangement, or UK cordset strategy. The UK plug requirement is a market-entry blocker even where the electronics already satisfy GB 4943.1, UK electrical safety and EMC evidence.
gap.zh: 围绕中国、欧盟或美国插脚设计的充电器本体，通常需要英国专用插头设计、合规转换插头方案或英国线缆组件策略。即使电子部分已满足 GB 4943.1、英国电气安全和 EMC 证据，英国插头要求仍可能成为市场准入阻断项。
gap.zht: 圍繞中國、歐盟或美國插腳設計的充電器本體，通常需要英國專用插頭設計、合規轉換插頭方案或英國線纜組件策略。即使電子部分已滿足 GB 4943.1、英國電氣安全和 EMC 證據，英國插頭要求仍可能成為市場准入阻斷項。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — the Plugs and Sockets, etc. (Safety) Regulations 1994 apply where the product and supply model are in scope. BS 1363 is the technical plug route referenced by the UK plug-safety regime.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CN plug and CCC requirements may apply for China-market sale, but they do not satisfy the UK BS 1363 plug requirement.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A CN-plug GaN charger cannot be treated as UK-ready merely by adding product-safety test reports. The UK plug interface must be addressed under the Plugs and Sockets, etc. (Safety) Regulations 1994 and BS 1363 practice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国插头氮化镓充电器不能仅凭产品安全测试报告视为可直接进入英国。英国插头接口必须依据《1994年插头和插座等（安全）法规》及 BS 1363 实务处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國插頭氮化鎵充電器不能僅憑產品安全測試報告視為可直接進入英國。英國插頭接口必須依據《1994年插頭和插座等（安全）法規》及 BS 1363 實務處理。
